 62â†’        get() = bgDispatcher + job

 81â†’    fun start(siteCreationState: SiteCreationState) {
 82â†’        if (isStarted) return else isStarted = true
 83â†’        require(siteCreationState.result is Created)
 84â†’        siteDesign = siteCreationState.siteDesign

 86â†’        isFree = requireNotNull(siteCreationState.domain).isFree

 89â†’        if (result is CreatedButNotFetched) {

103â†’    private fun startPreLoadingWebView() {
104â†’        tracker.trackPreviewLoading(siteDesign)
105â†’        launch {
106â†’            /**
107â†’             * If the webview is still not loaded after some delay, we'll show the loading shimmer animation instead
108â†’             * of the full screen progress, so the user is not blocked for taking actions.

110â†’            withContext(mainDispatcher) {

118â†’        result.site.url?.let { url ->

132â†’        val onSiteFetched = fetchWpComSiteUseCase.fetchSiteWithRetry(remoteSiteId)

134â†’            return requireNotNull(siteStore.getSiteBySiteId(remoteSiteId)) {

136â†’            }

139â†’        }

162â†’    private fun createSitePreviewData(): UrlData {
163â†’        val url = domainName
164â†’        val subDomain = urlUtils.extractSubDomain(url)
165â†’        val fullUrl = urlUtils.addUrlSchemeIfNeeded(url, true)

170â†’            url,
171â†’            subDomainIndices,
172â†’            domainIndices
173â†’        )

159â†’    /**
160â†’     * The service automatically shows system notifications when site creation is in progress and the app is in
161â†’     * the background. We need to connect to the `AutoForeground` service from the View(Fragment), as only the View
162â†’     * knows when the app is in the background. Required parameter for `ServiceEventConnection` is also
163â†’     * the observer/listener of the `SiteCreationServiceState` (VM in our case), therefore we can't simply register
164â†’     * to the EventBus from the ViewModel and we have to use `sticky` events instead.
165â†’     */
166â†’    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND, sticky = true)
167â†’    @Suppress("unused")
168â†’    fun onSiteCreationServiceStateUpdated(event: SiteCreationServiceState) {
169â†’        if (lastReceivedServiceState == event) return // filter out events which we've already received
170â†’        lastReceivedServiceState = event
171â†’        when (event.step) {
172â†’            IDLE, CREATE_SITE -> Unit
173â†’            SUCCESS -> {
174â†’                site = mapPayloadToSiteModel(event.payload)
175â†’                _onFreeSiteCreated.postValue(site) // MainVM will navigate forward if the domain is free
176â†’                if (!domain.isFree && siteCreationState.plan?.productId != 0) {
177â†’                    createCart()

179â†’            }
180â†’
181â†’            FAILURE -> {
182â†’                serviceStateForRetry = event.payload as SiteCreationServiceState
183â†’                tracker.trackErrorShown(
184â†’                    ERROR_CONTEXT,
185â†’                    UNKNOWN,
186â†’                    "SiteCreation service failed"
187â†’                )
188â†’                updateUiStateAsync(GenericError)
189â†’            }
190â†’        }
191â†’    }

193â†’    private fun mapPayloadToSiteModel(payload: Any?): SiteModel {
194â†’        require(payload is Pair<*, *>) { "Expected Pair in Payload, got: $payload" }
195â†’        val (blogId, blogUrl) = payload
196â†’        require(blogId is Long) { "Expected the 1st element in the Payload Pair to be a Long, got: $blogId" }
197â†’        require(blogUrl is String) { "Expected the 2nd element in the Payload Pair to be a Long, got: $blogUrl" }
198â†’        return SiteModel().apply { siteId = blogId; url = blogUrl }
199â†’    }
